risk_if_not_implemented: Without Data Breach, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Ongoing Contingency Planning
compensating_control_1.justification: Ongoing Contingency Planning (BCD-06) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Data Breach (IRO-04.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Incident Response Plan (IRP)
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to maintain and make available a current and viable Incident Response Plan (IRP) to all stakeholders.
compensating_control_2.justification: Incident Response Plan (IRP) (IRO-04) provides incident response capability that compensates for the absence of Data Breach (IRO-04.1) by enabling timely detection, containment, and recovery from security events in the absence of the primary control. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
